entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `seedKey` TEXT, `toggle` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_example_seedKey` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`seedKey`)
